Opening October 2026 — Martens Pet Cremation Services is preparing to serve families across Central Alberta. For questions or future arrangements, please contact us.

Family-owned

Meet Matt & Joanne

A family-owned business being built with compassion, integrity, and respect for every beloved companion.

A family business built with care

Matt and Joanne are the heart behind Martens Pet Cremation Services, a family-owned business built on compassion, integrity, and a genuine desire to help others.

As lifelong animal lovers and members of the community, they understand the special bond people share with their pets. Every beloved companion deserves to be treated with dignity, care, and respect.

At Martens Pet Cremation Services, families will not be treated like just another client. Matt and Joanne’s goal is to provide care that feels personal, respectful, and rooted in trust.

Values guiding the work ahead

Simple, heartfelt principles shape the way Martens Pet Cremation Services is being built.

Compassion

Gentle care for families facing a tender goodbye.

Integrity

Clear communication, honest guidance, and trustworthy arrangements.

Respect

Dignity for every beloved companion and every family story.

Have questions before we open?

Matt and Joanne welcome you to reach out with questions about future arrangements, services, or memorial product options.

Contact Us

Family-owned pet cremation services preparing to serve Central Alberta.
